content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Bead fyj is correctly implemented. The hardcoded Duration::from_secs(300) at src/contexts/requirements_drafting/service.rs has been replaced with a config-driven timeout that resolves through AgentExecutionService::timeout_for_policy_role -> BackendPolicyService::timeout_for_role, using target.backend.family and a BackendRole -> BackendPolicyRole mapping that covers all five variants. All requirements service builders now wire in effective_config. A new integration test asserts that configured per-backend/per-role timeouts (claude.planner, codex.reviewer) are honored for draft, review, and seed stages, and that test passes. cargo fmt and cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings pass. The one pre-existing unrelated unit test failure (workflow_engine_test::pre_commit_failure_remediation_survives_resume) reproduces on the fork point. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps identified.

## Amendments

None.
